pi_items.source: Task-specific identifier found in setup_task.sh:10, export_result.sh:10, and verifier.py:50
Task-specific date found in setup_task.sh:34 and verifier.py:51

OSCAR EMR manual (oscarmanual.org) mentions 'Flu shots' as tracked preventions. Influenza is a standard vaccine supported in immunization systems and OSCAR EMR's CVCImmunization table framework supports custom vaccine types including Influenza
setup_oscar.sh:217 sets oscardoc account password; setup_oscar.sh:375 shows login credentials; task.json:21 describes username field
setup_oscar.sh:217 explicitly sets password to 'oscar'; setup_oscar.sh:375 shows login credentials in status summary
setup_oscar.sh:217 sets PIN to '1117'; setup_oscar.sh:375 shows PIN in status summary

privileged_info_summary: The task uses OSCAR EMR 24.09.10 (Open version) running in Docker via openosp/open-osp:release image with MariaDB 10.5 backend. The administrator credentials are username: oscardoc, password: oscar, PIN: 1117. The task requires adding vaccine lot FL2025-X9 with expiry date 2026-12-31 for Influenza vaccine type to the prevention_lot database table. All credentials and identifiers are task-specific synthetic values confirmed in the setup and verification scripts.
